overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit underground commercial walkway. The player passes cylindrical holographic displays, vending machines, and NPCs, circles around a large central heart display, passes a deceased character on the ground, and continues toward an exit showing the city above.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit underground pedestrian walkway with advertising

events.description: approaching the large cylindrical heart display in the center of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor toward the cylindrical display, observing the neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: standing still near the cylindrical display ahead
walking slowly with a white X symbol on their back

entered.detail: large transparent cylindrical structure with a glowing red heart suspended inside
illuminated digital kiosk displaying 'Real Man's Smell' advertisement
multiple glowing signs and advertisements on the right wall
simple concrete seating along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, neon-lit underground corridor with green and yellow tiled flooring. The player walks forward toward a prominent cylindrical display containing a red heart, passing concrete benches and illuminated advertising kiosks. Sparse NPCs stand or walk in the vicinity, and the environment is characterized by cyberpunk neon aesthetics with purple and cyan lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway with central cylindrical display and vending area

events.description: circling around the cylindrical heart display to the right side
deceased character becomes visible on the ground near the vending machines

agents.ego_description: circling around the cylindrical display and approaching a deceased character lying on the ground

notable_agents.action: standing by the cylindrical display wearing a purple shirt
standing near the deceased character wearing a white tank top

entered.detail: deceased character lying face-down on the ground near a cleaning bucket
large vertical illuminated advertisement showing a face with 'enjoy it' text
tall black vending machine with red 'NiCOLA' branding

segments.scene_description: The player circles around the cylindrical heart display, revealing a deceased character on the ground near a cleaning bucket. A large vertical 'enjoy it' advertisement dominates the right side, while a tall NiCOLA vending machine stands on the left. NPCs stand near the body and display, and the cylindrical structure moves behind the player as they navigate the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground corridor with graffiti and vending machines

events.description: passing the deceased character and continuing down the corridor
approaching the bright exit at the end of the corridor where natural light becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking past the deceased character and continuing toward the lit exit at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: wall with 'FUTURE' graffiti text and green neon accent lighting
bright opening at the end of the corridor showing daylight and buildings above
row of illuminated vending machines along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player walks past the deceased character, leaving the vending area behind. The corridor continues with graffiti-covered walls and rows of vending machines. The environment becomes emptier of NPCs, and the player approaches a bright exit at the far end where natural daylight and city buildings become visible, indicating the end of the underground section.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between underground walkway and surface

events.description: approaching the open exit where the corridor meets the surface level with visible buildings
turning right to reveal a side corridor branching off the main path

agents.ego_description: approaching the surface exit and turning to examine a side corridor while observing the city structures above

entered.detail: tall city buildings visible through the open exit above ground level
branching passage extending to the right with purple neon lighting
horizontal purple neon light strips running along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the end of the corridor where the roof opens up to reveal towering city buildings above. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to a mix of neon and natural daylight. The player then turns right to explore a side corridor, revealing additional branching pathways while the main exit falls behind. Purple neon strips illuminate the walls, and the environment maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with views of the urban landscape above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit underground corridor that gradually opens up to reveal a towering urban cityscape. It begins by moving along green and yellow tiled flooring past illuminated kiosks and concrete benches toward a prominent cylindrical display containing a red heart. As the camera circles this display, the scene shifts to reveal a deceased character on the ground flanked by a NiCOLA vending machine and a large vertical advertisement. The movement then carries the viewer past the body and through a graffiti-covered stretch of the corridor, where the artificial purple and cyan lighting begins to blend with natural daylight streaming from a distant exit. Finally, the roof opens to expose massive city buildings above before the camera turns right into a side corridor illuminated by purple neon strips.
